query: DELETE fd1 FROM financialData fd1 INNER JOIN financialData fd2 ON fd1.projectId = fd2.projectId AND fd1.consultantId = fd2.consultantId AND fd1.id < fd2.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute DELETE fd1 FROM financialData fd1 INNER JOIN financialData fd2 ON fd1.projectId = fd2.projectId AND fd1.consultantId = fd2.consultantId AND fd1.id < fd2.id
